rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/18/19. No proof of service of the corrected Notice of Hearing has been filed yet. No proof of service of the Supplement has been filed yet. rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE RICHARD L. STRATTON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/28/19 - no courtesy copy of Petition. The Petition has not been reviewed; however, as a preliminary matter, Examiner notes that: (1) the Notice of Hearing does not include the information required by Prob. C. Sec. 851(c) - all interested parties must either receive proper notice or sign informed consents including that information; and (2) there is no POS showing notice was served in the manner provided by CCP Sec. 413.10 - if Trustor was survived by heirs-at-law who are not beneficiaries of the Trust, they must receive or waive notice served in such manner (Prob. C. Sec. 17203(b)). Please advise Examiner if additional time is required to serve notice. Endorsed-filed copy of Petition and additional documents filed must be received in Room 202 by 5/21/19.
